CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dimsiss Action O Graound Of Forum Non Conveniens; Memo Of P&A; Compendium
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ZIMMER, INC., ZIMMER HOLDINGS, INC., WILSON/PHILLIPS HOLDINGS, INC. A/K/A ZIMMER WILSON PHILLIPS and ZIMMER ORTHOPEDIC SURGICAL PRODUCTS, INC., N/K/A ZIMMER SURGICAL, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss Action On Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens is Granted. No opposition filed. The court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers as modified. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR # 7489
